title: Figured out something why the 30 spears changed
display_title: Figured out something why the 30 spears changed
wikitext:
[]: Figured out something; why the 3.0 spears changed.             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Thu Mar 13, 2014 12:22 am Remember how in Eva 2.0, Kaworu calls Gendo "Father"? Well, in Eva 3.33, Kaworu says "Two souls are required to bring both lances back." Since Rei is a clone of Yui, this could be heavily implying that Kaworu is a clone of Shinji. The reason the spears switched to be the same is because there weren't two souls pulling them out. So, one soul was pulling the spears out-- Shinji's. That's why the spears changed. That's why Kaworu's plan went awry. I'm not sure if this has ever been posted before, chances are it has, but I haven't seen it talked about so I figured I'd post it.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Mar 13, 2014 1:05 am But didn't Kaworu say that the spears were different (than the one that he was expecting to be there) before any of them got pulled out?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Mar 13, 2014 1:42 am While it's an interesting theory, I'm with Ornette. The spears looked the same before they were pulled.

[]:             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Thu Mar 13, 2014 1:56 am Ah, my bad. It's been a while since I saw the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Mar 13, 2014 2:30 am Hey, no worries. New theories are what keep EGF alive. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Thu Mar 13, 2014 2:50 am Also Kaworu is the 1st Angel, so him being a clone in this doesn't quite work out.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Mar 13, 2014 3:57 am Also, if Kaworu was a clone of Shinji, wouldn't he, well, look exactly like Shinji but palette swapped?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Mar 13, 2014 11:05 am It's quite likely that would be the case, considering that Rei looks so similar to Yui that they could pull off that "transition" scene when she was eating lunch with Gendo in his office.

[]:             Quote Post by Chroma » Thu Mar 13, 2014 12:45 pm Ornette wrote: But didn't Kaworu say that the spears were different (than the one that he was expecting to be there) before any of them got pulled out?

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Thu Mar 13, 2014 12:53 pm Guys... what if... what if Kaworu is a clone... of Gendo? It would still jive with him calling him "Father" and Gendo's aged a lot so it would explain the discrepancy in looks.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Mar 13, 2014 1:23 pm There was a thread that IIRC talked about how calling the father of somebody you know "father" is meant to imply familiarity. It came up that Kaworu may have been doing this as a joke, to imply familiarity where none exists.

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Fri Mar 14, 2014 8:10 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: There was a thread that IIRC talked about how calling the father of somebody you know "father" is meant to imply familiarity. It came up that Kaworu may have been doing this as a joke, to imply familiarity where none exists.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Fri Mar 14, 2014 8:28 am CJD wrote: Guys... what if... what if Kaworu is a clone... of Gendo? It would still jive with him calling him "Father" and Gendo's aged a lot so it would explain the discrepancy in looks.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Mar 14, 2014 11:45 am Th3Marauder wrote: Is this apparent if you know Japanese and watch the sub?

[]:             Quote Post by ::KL7:: » Fri Mar 14, 2014 5:22 pm Hey everyone I've been a member for a few months but only have like 2 posts. Usually if I have a question about Eva I can find the answer here. But reading this thread I was wondering, why is Kaworu able to pull the spear but Rei unable to if they both have the SoL soul in them? Or is it that Shinji has to be part of the duo wielding the spears to fix the world on his terms?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Mar 14, 2014 5:37 pm ^ Well, first we don't know if Rei has Lilith's soul like in NGE, and even if it's the case, it's Rei II who would be the most likely to have it, the one whose soul is trapped inside EVA-01, alongside Yui. Rei Q is "just" a clone based of the Ayanami Type genetic data, not a body with the previous Rei's soul transfered in it like it was between Rei II and Rei III in NGE. So either she simply doesn't have a soul(meaning that in Rebuild soulless entities can survive outside a tank of LCL), or she have an artificial one, or only a fragment of a soul, or she's "linked" to Rei II's soul, or she has her own soul but is "located" in a different place of her body of her body, whatever that means. It's also possibly that Kaworu simply lied to Shinji to prevent any possibility that he steps down, and/or simply that Shinji was needed because he's an Impact Trigger and thus could serve as a back-up if something happens to Kaworu, also maybe only an Impact Trigger can use the power of a spear.(meaning whatever they are supposed to do combined to an Impact, not just throwing them to kill Angels or freeze godly beings) TL;DR : we don't have enough information to have a clear answer, like so many things in 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by ::KL7:: » Fri Mar 14, 2014 7:46 pm Thank you for the quick response. :) It completely slipped my mind about Rei II still possessing Lilith's soul. If that is the case, same as nge.

[]:             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Mon Mar 17, 2014 10:02 pm Kaworu also said that her soul is "In another place", if I recall correctly.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Mar 18, 2014 4:02 am Adaminator1 wrote: Kaworu also said that her soul is "In another place", if I recall correctly.
